name: Pluno
description: Automates web apps through their underlying APIs rather than clicking the UI, running as a browser extension. Claims ~10x speed and ~10x fewer tokens than click-based browser agents.

skills.name: API-Driven Automation
skills.description: Drives web apps through their backing APIs instead of simulating clicks for faster, cheaper automation.

skills.name: Browser-Extension Agent
skills.description: Runs as a browser extension that operates the apps you are already logged into in your tabs.

skills.name: Token-Efficient Runs
skills.description: Completes multi-tool web tasks with roughly 10x fewer tokens than click-based browser agents.
